taskTemplate.name: Closing Setup
taskTemplate.description: Configure loan file in the system for closing — names, vesting, fees, and plan code

subTaskTemplate.name: Adjust Names
subTaskTemplate.description: Adjust Names – Adjust names in file to match title report. Enter AKAs as needed if changes are required.

subTaskTemplate.name: Build Vesting
subTaskTemplate.description: Build Vesting – Build vesting in the system to match the title report.

subTaskTemplate.name: Reconcile Fees
subTaskTemplate.description: Reconcile Fees – Reconcile fees in the system. If appraisal was obtained, enter the appraisal fee and mark it as paid outside of closing if the fee was received prior to closing. Remove the appraisal fee if no appraisal was used. The appraisal fee should be the only fee listed.

subTaskTemplate.name: Enter Plan Code
subTaskTemplate.description: Enter Plan Code – Enter the plan code in the system.
